ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incarceration_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year of data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the correctional system */,
  "incarceration_rate" REAL /* Incarceration rate per 100,000 individuals */,
  "projected_adp" REAL /* Projected average daily population for the year */,
  "peak_factor" REAL /* Factor indicating maximum occupancy for facilities */,
  "projected_beds" INTEGER /* Projected number of beds needed in facilities */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the data */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Facility ID to which the data is linked */,
  "inmate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each incarcerated individual */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was admitted */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the individual is expected to be released */,
  "sentence_length" TEXT /* Length of the sentence in years or months */,
  "charge" TEXT /* Primary charge leading to incarceration */,
  "parole_eligibility" TEXT /* Date when the individual becomes eligible for parole */,
  "rehab_program" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the individual is in a rehabilitation program */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Text field for any medical conditions */,
  "mental_health_conditions" TEXT /* Text field for any mental health conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incarceration_data_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_data ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_data" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the correctional facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the facility in terms of beds */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., maximum security, minimum security) */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the facility opened */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the facility closed (if applicable) */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of inmates */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_rating" TEXT /* Rating from the last inspection */,
  "rehab_program_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of beds available for rehabilitation programs */,
  "medical_facility_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of beds available for medical care */,
  "mental_health_facility_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of beds available for mental health care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of incarceration data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the incarcerated individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the incarcerated individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the incarcerated individuals */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage representation of the demographic group */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the data */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status before incarceration */,
  "prior_incarceration" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the individual has been incarcerated before */,
  "drug_use_history" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the individual has a history of drug use */,
  "mental_health_history" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the individual has a history of mental health issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES incarceration_data ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projection */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population in the correctional system */,
  "incarceration_rate" REAL /* Projected incarceration rate per 100,000 individuals */,
  "estimated_beds" INTEGER /* Estimated number of beds required for the projected population */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the projection */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Facility ID to which the projection is linked */,
  "projected_medical_beds" INTEGER /* Projected number of medical beds required */,
  "projected_mental_health_beds" INTEGER /* Projected number of mental health beds required */,
  "projected_rehab_beds" INTEGER /* Projected number of rehabilitation beds required */,
  "projected_parole_eligible" INTEGER /* Projected number of individuals eligible for parole */,
  "projected_release_date" TEXT /* Projected average release date for the population */,
  "projected_reincarceration_rate" REAL /* Projected reincarceration rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_data ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES incarceration_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "bed_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bed utilization report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility being reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the facility */,
  "occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds currently occupied */,
  "utilization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of bed utilization */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the data */,
  "medical_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of medical beds currently occupied */,
  "mental_health_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of mental health beds currently occupied */,
  "rehab_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of rehabilitation beds currently occupied */,
  "parole_eligible_occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of parole-eligible individuals currently occupying beds */,
  "reincarceration_rate" REAL /* Current reincarceration rate for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_utilization_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_data ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the policy change was enacted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy change */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the policy change */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., sentencing, rehabilitation, parole) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy will expire (if applicable) */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Text field for an assessment of the policy's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the author of the report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Facility ID to which the report is linked */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, special) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the report (e.g., state-wide, facility-specific) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report's findings */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_data ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the author belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the author's last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State or region of the access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Facility ID to which the access event is linked */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken during the access event (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facility_data ("facility_id")
)
